name: signal-scan
description: Scan Reddit, X, and HN for demand signals every 6 hours
prompt: Run a signal scan across Reddit, X/Twitter, and Hacker News. Look for demand signals: people complaining about existing tools, asking for solutions, or describing pain points with money attached. Apply your 3-filter system (pain, wallet, timing). Report findings organized by Hot Opportunities, AI/Tech Updates, and Patterns. If nothing noteworthy, say so.
